title: Jarvis Gao
text:
About Me
I am currently a graduate student at Columbia University.
Previously, I studied Finance at Shanghai University of Finance and Economics.
My professional interests lie in understanding and modeling complex financial markets, where extracting meaningful signals from noisy data is a central challenge. I focus in particular on volatility, derivatives, and systematic trading strategies.
Outside my academic and professional work, I enjoy Formula 1, basketball, and traveling.
